summary: Iteration 3 testing completed successfully. All new features verified: image-based sharing implementation, consistent card bottom borders with flex layout, and 'Know Your Food' branding watermark. Backend: Card counts updated correctly (10, 13, 14). Frontend: All UI features working including home screen, tab navigation, card layouts, share buttons, and branding.
critical_code_review_comments: Image-based sharing properly implemented with react-native-view-shot and expo-sharing
Fallback to text-based sharing works correctly when image capture fails
Card layout uses flex:1 with flexGrow:1 on scrollContent for consistent height
Progress bar pushed to bottom using marginTop:'auto' - consistent across all cards
Branding watermark 'Know Your Food' present at card bottom with leaf icon
All cards have proper testID attributes for share buttons
Card title displays with emoji icon on left side as designed
Share button meets 44x44 touch target size
All React Native components properly used (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView)
seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. Using existing seed_data.py with updated card counts: Protein (10 cards), Carbs (13 cards), Fats (14 cards)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 focused on testing latest changes: (1) Image-based sharing using react-native-view-shot + expo-sharing with text fallback, (2) Consistent card bottom borders using flex layout and marginTop:auto on progress bar, (3) 'Know Your Food' branding watermark at card bottom. All features verified and working correctly. Card counts increased by 1 each from iteration 1 (now 10, 13, 14). Direct URL navigation works perfectly for all routes (/protein, /carbs, /fats). Console warnings about 'shadow*' and 'pointerEvents' are expected in web preview and not critical.

backend_verification.GET /api/topics: ✓ Returns 3 topics with correct card counts (10, 13, 14)
backend_verification.GET /api/share/protein_01: ✓ Returns share data with card_id, topic_title, card_title, card_number, content_text

frontend_tests.home_screen: ✓ Loads with 'Know Your Food' header (leaf icon + text)
frontend_tests.topic_cards: ✓ All 3 topic cards visible and clickable (Protein, Carbs, Fats)
frontend_tests.tab_navigation: ✓ All 4 tabs present (Home, Protein, Carbs, Fats) - direct URL navigation verified
frontend_tests.protein_topic: ✓ Loads with 10 cards, progress bar shows '1 of 10'
frontend_tests.carbs_topic: ✓ Loads with 13 cards, progress bar shows '1 of 13'
frontend_tests.fats_topic: ✓ Loads with 14 cards, progress bar shows '1 of 14'
frontend_tests.share_button: ✓ Visible on all cards with proper testID (share-btn-{card_id})
frontend_tests.card_layout: ✓ Consistent bottom borders - progress bar with borderTopWidth:1, marginTop:'auto'
frontend_tests.card_title: ✓ Displays with emoji icon on left side (e.g., ⚠️, 🍚, ⚖️)
frontend_tests.branding_watermark: ✓ 'Know Your Food' with leaf icon present at card bottom
frontend_tests.card_structure: ✓ Card uses flex:1, scrollContent uses flexGrow:1, progress pushed to bottom

image_based_sharing.details: Uses react-native-view-shot captureRef with PNG format, quality 0.85. Falls back to text-based sharing if image capture fails. Share button has proper testID for testing.

consistent_card_borders.details: Card uses flex:1 with minHeight:520. ScrollContent has flexGrow:1. Progress bar uses marginTop:'auto' to push to bottom. BorderTopWidth:1 creates consistent top border for progress section.

branding_watermark.details: Branding row with leaf icon and 'Know Your Food' text at card bottom. Styled with fontSize:11, color:#AAA, fontWeight:600. Present on all cards.

console_warnings: props.pointerEvents deprecated warning (expected in web preview, not critical)
shadow* style props deprecated warning (expected in web preview, not critical)
observations.card_counts_updated: Card counts increased by 1 each from iteration 1: Protein (9→10), Carbs (12→13), Fats (13→14)
observations.direct_url_navigation: All routes work correctly via direct URL navigation (/protein, /carbs, /fats)
observations.branding_visibility: Branding watermark is present in DOM and visible, located at bottom of scrollable card content
